paragraphs: Fermi Inc's stock price is currently at 5.93, with a decrease of 5.12% from the prior close and 31.52% over the last 20 sessions. The price quote is as of July 16, 2026.

There have been 4 new news articles in the last 24 hours, with recent headlines discussing the company's governance concerns and a $375 million convertibles deal. The news articles also mention the resignation of director designee Miles Everson, who cited governance concerns.

The company has filed several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K form disclosing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and another 8-K form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson. There has been 1 Form 4 filing and 0 Form 144 filings.
